.

posts.raw_content:
This place was so much better when it was called TheDonald.win.

Now it's just an embarrassment compared to what it was like before.

This forum was intended to be supportive of Trump, but has almost turned into the opposite and is now almost as hostile to Trump as many leftwing forums. It's one thing to criticize Trump for mistakes and you don't have to agree with him on everything, but now over half the people on this place have turned their backs on him and are vindictive about it to the point they seem to have no problem deliberately letting the left get back into power out of spite, either by sitting out the midterms or voting Democrat with an accelerationist mindset.

The people on here have become such astounding nihilistic fatalists that I honestly have to question how the fuck y'all live with yourselves. Either you people are beyond miserable inside or you've allowed your nihilism to decay your moral compass and have become psychopaths that just want to see the world burn at this point. Either way, it's disturbing.

I've really been starting to think many of you people actually legitimately don't give a shit about the USA. And you want it to fail just so you can be condescending and say "I told you so", and go on an arrogant tirade about how right you were about all of your doomsday predictions.

I can already imagine a bunch of people on here will have self-destructive fatalistic celebrations if the Democrats win the midterms. And I want no fucking part of that.

The only reason I still spend time here is because there are still some reasonable people here that still act in good faith. Unfortunately that can't be said for over half this forum.

That Ms. Carroll is crazier than a

posts.raw_content:
Unless something very recently has occurred, there has been no payment.

Would contend that Carroll will never see a penny.

Reminder:  Her only evidence that Trump new her was a group pic taken at a Charity/Society Event in New York with hundreds in attendance.

So, this lady has a group pic with the most photographed New Yorker of all time from an event with hundreds of folks.

If anyone can find where other evidence was supplied, please correct the above.

DJT claims he never new this lady.  

Her claim:  The owner of the Plaza Hotel, next door to the alleged location, had contact of a sexual nature with her in a dressing room at a department store.

The incident occurred around about a 2-year period.  Claims it occurred in latter 95 or earlier 96.  Convenient.   Eliminates the ability for the accused to produce exculpatory evidence.  A guy like Trump in that time period, again the most recognizable NY'er on the planet, would likely be able to produce records of his actual location.

BTW, she did not even tell anyone of the event until 2019, or 23 - 24 years later.  Recall she can only pin it down to 2 calendar years.

This is a case that should have been dismissed on summary judgement pretrial.  It is a legal travesty.  

Any rational human being without an agenda would consider this case "made up".
